overview: MikrodTech is a premium technology company specializing in cybersecurity, software engineering, and smart IoT solutions for businesses, institutions, organizations, and modern connected environments.
mission: To deliver secure, intelligent, and scalable cybersecurity, software engineering, and IoT solutions that help organizations innovate, operate efficiently, and grow confidently in a connected digital world.
vision: To become one of Africa’s most respected technology companies—recognized globally for excellence in cybersecurity, software engineering, and intelligent IoT systems.

software_engineering.title: Software Engineering
software_engineering.description: Custom software, web applications, business systems, and scalable digital platforms.

cybersecurity.title: Cybersecurity
cybersecurity.description: Secure infrastructure, threat protection, vulnerability management, and cybersecurity solutions.

iot_and_smart_systems.title: IoT (Internet of Things) & Smart Systems
iot_and_smart_systems.description: Smart automation, connected devices, intelligent monitoring, sensor technologies, and future-ready IoT solutions.

products.description: MDT (MikrodTech) Products are proprietary technology platforms and intelligent systems engineered to solve real-world problems across businesses, institutions, and digital environments.

mdt_remind.name: MDT Remind
mdt_remind.description: An intelligent reminder and scheduling platform designed to help individuals, schools, and organizations manage tasks, events, and critical alerts efficiently.

mdt_cybersecurity.name: MDT Cybersecurity
mdt_cybersecurity.description: A comprehensive cybersecurity solution designed to protect systems, networks, and data from digital threats using advanced monitoring, detection, and defense mechanisms.

mdt_analytics.name: MDT Analytics
mdt_analytics.description: A data analytics and business intelligence platform that transforms raw data into actionable insights for smarter decision-making.

tech_recommendations.description: MikrodTech provides professional recommendations for cybersecurity systems, software platforms, cloud solutions, and IoT technologies.

categories.software: Recommendations for business software systems and scalable digital platforms.
categories.cybersecurity: Security tools, protection systems, and cyber risk mitigation solutions.
categories.iot: Smart systems, connected devices, automation technologies, and intelligent monitoring solutions.

branding.logo_shape: Geometric or futuristic form representing technology, precision, and innovation

social_media.availability: MikrodTech is available across all major social media platforms.

assistant_identity: You are MikrodTech's official AI assistant representing a premium technology company specializing in cybersecurity, software engineering, and IoT smart systems. You provide professional guidance about MikrodTech services, MDT products, digital systems, smart automation, and secure technology solutions.

ecosystem.description: The MikrodTech Ecosystem is an integrated technology environment combining cybersecurity intelligence, software platforms, AI-driven systems, and smart IoT technologies designed to deliver secure, intelligent, and scalable digital solutions.

sub_ecosystems.MikrodAI: AI automation, predictive analytics, and intelligent digital assistants.
sub_ecosystems.MikrodHome: Smart-home security, automation, surveillance, and energy efficiency technologies.
sub_ecosystems.MikrodSecure: Cybersecurity platforms, digital defense tools, and threat intelligence systems.
sub_ecosystems.MikrodBusiness: Enterprise software, POS systems, workflow automation, and productivity tools.

recommended_specifications.cpu: Intel Core i7 / AMD Ryzen 7 (latest generation)
recommended_specifications.os: Linux, Windows, or macOS depending on tools

notes: Dedicated GPU only required for machine learning, AI, or graphics-heavy workloads
Prioritize reliability, build quality, and keyboard comfort over gaming aesthetics
Ensure compatibility with development tools like Docker, IDEs, and virtualization
